package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for select_with_single_case: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `select { case v := <-ch: ... }` with only one case and no default
type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSelectWithSingleCaseModel
}

type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseService struct {
    repo *CaseSelectWithSingleCaseRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSelectWithSingleCase(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSelectWithSingleCaseDTO) error {
    focus := "select_with_single_case"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    select_single_case_negative := map[string]int{"select": 1, "single": 2, "case": 3}
    select_single_case_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    select_negative_0 := select_single_case_negative["select"] + len(input)
    _ = select_negative_0
    single_negative_1 := select_single_case_negative["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_negative_1
    case_negative_2 := select_single_case_negative["case"] + len(input)
    _ = case_negative_2
    return nil
}
